name: Axure RP
description: Enterprise-grade UX prototyping and specification tool for creating highly interactive wireframes with conditional logic, dynamic content, and functional forms — without code.

seo.title: Axure RP — Design Tools / Design-to-Code
seo.meta_description: Axure RP: Enterprise-grade UX prototyping and specification tool for creating highly interactive wireframes with conditional logic, dynamic content, and functio

when_to_use: Complex conditional prototype for enterprise dashboard UX
Developer-ready functional spec with annotated interactions
Stakeholder sign-off prototype with simulated form logic
Accessibility-annotated wireframes with ARIA role notes
Multi-flow user journey prototype for usability testing

pros: Conditional logic and dynamic content without code
Rich specs output useful for enterprise handoff
Proven for complex form flows and interactions
Long-standing favorite of UX teams in regulated industries
cons: Steep learning curve compared to Figma prototyping
UI feels dated next to modern design tools
Collaboration weaker than Figma's real-time model
review.verdict: Still unmatched for conditional, logic-heavy prototypes in enterprise UX, but overkill for most modern product teams.
review.best_for: Enterprise UX teams prototyping complex, logic-driven flows and forms.
review.not_for: Visual-first product teams who live in Figma or need simple clickthroughs.
